category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI for querying node_modules; official README says qnm queries the node_modules directory.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is ranyitz/qnm and README names qnm; source_facts.name is qnm.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage, features, options, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to https://github.com/ranyitz/qnm; official GitHub repository page is ranyitz/qnm.
tags_sources: Official README describes qnm as a CLI utility for node_modules, supporting npm and yarn and fuzzy search.
